title: aiger suprove engine crash
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

using the files from the enclosed zip
[MCVE.zip](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/3515572/MCVE.zip)

from the command line run "sby -f MCVE.sby"

Note: as configured this elementary example contains a purposeful fail condition (line 37 should contain an addition rather than AND operator).


## Expected behavior

When the config file is reconfigured to use the "abc pdr" engine the following response is seen:
```
SBY 12:18:14 [MCVE] Removing direcory 'MCVE'.
SBY 12:18:14 [MCVE] Copy 'MCVE.sv' to 'MCVE/src/MCVE.sv'.
SBY 12:18:14 [MCVE] engine_0: abc pdr
SBY 12:18:14 [MCVE] nomem: starting process "cd MCVE/src; yosys -ql ../model/design_nomem.log ../model/design_nomem.ys"
SBY 12:18:14 [MCVE] nomem: finished (returncode=0)
SBY 12:18:14 [MCVE] aig: starting process "cd MCVE/model; yosys -ql design_aiger.log design_aiger.ys"
SBY 12:18:14 [MCVE] aig: finished (returncode=0)
SBY 12:18:14 [MCVE] engine_0: starting process "cd MCVE; yosys-abc -c 'read_aiger model/design_aiger.aig; fold; strash; pdr; write_cex -a engine_0/trace.aiw'"
SBY 12:18:14 [MCVE] engine_0: ABC command line: "read_aiger model/design_aiger.aig; fold; strash; pdr; write_cex -a engine_0/trace.aiw".
SBY 12:18:14 [MCVE] engine_0: Warning: The last 6 outputs are interpreted as constraints.
SBY 12:18:14 [MCVE] engine_0: Output 0 of miter "model/design_aiger" was asserted in frame 3.  Time =     0.01 sec
SBY 12:18:14 [MCVE] engine_0: finished (returncode=0)
SBY 12:18:14 [MCVE] engine_0: Status returned by engine: FAIL
SBY 12:18:14 [MCVE] base: starting process "cd MCVE/src; yosys -ql ../model/design.log ../model/design.ys"
SBY 12:18:14 [MCVE] base: finished (returncode=0)
SBY 12:18:14 [MCVE] smt2: starting process "cd MCVE/model; yosys -ql design_smt2.log design_smt2.ys"
SBY 12:18:14 [MCVE] smt2: finished (returncode=0)
SBY 12:18:14 [MCVE] engine_0: starting process "cd MCVE; yosys-smtbmc -s yices --noprogress --append 0 --dump-vcd engine_0/trace.vcd --dump-vlogtb engine_0/trace_tb.v --dump-smtc engine_0/trace.smtc --aig model/design_aiger.aim:engine_0/trace.aiw --aig-noheader model/design_smt2.smt2"
SBY 12:18:14 [MCVE] engine_0: ##   0:00:00  Solver: yices
SBY 12:18:14 [MCVE] engine_0: ##   0:00:00  Skipping step 0 (and assuming pass)..
SBY 12:18:14 [MCVE] engine_0: ##   0:00:00  Skipping step 1 (and assuming pass)..
SBY 12:18:14 [MCVE] engine_0: ##   0:00:00  Skipping step 2 (and assuming pass)..
SBY 12:18:14 [MCVE] engine_0: ##   0:00:00  Checking assertions in step 3..
SBY 12:18:14 [MCVE] engine_0: ##   0:00:00  BMC failed!
SBY 12:18:14 [MCVE] engine_0: ##   0:00:00  Assert failed in MCVE: MCVE.sv:37
SBY 12:18:14 [MCVE] engine_0: ##   0:00:00  Writing trace to VCD file: engine_0/trace.vcd
SBY 12:18:14 [MCVE] engine_0: ##   0:00:00  Writing trace to Verilog testbench: engine_0/trace_tb.v
SBY 12:18:14 [MCVE] engine_0: ##   0:00:00  Writing trace to constraints file: engine_0/trace.smtc
SBY 12:18:14 [MCVE] engine_0: ##   0:00:00  Status: FAILED (!)
SBY 12:18:14 [MCVE] engine_0: finished (returncode=1)
SBY 12:18:14 [MCVE] summary: Elapsed clock time [H:MM:SS (secs)]: 0:00:00 (0)
SBY 12:18:14 [MCVE] summary: Elapsed process time [H:MM:SS (secs)]: 0:00:00 (0)
SBY 12:18:14 [MCVE] summary: engine_0 (abc pdr) returned FAIL
SBY 12:18:14 [MCVE] summary: counterexample trace: MCVE/engine_0/trace.vcd
SBY 12:18:14 [MCVE] DONE (FAIL, rc=2)
```

## Actual behavior

what is seen with the suprove engine:
```
SBY 12:13:58 [MCVE] Removing direcory 'MCVE'.
SBY 12:13:58 [MCVE] Copy 'MCVE.sv' to 'MCVE/src/MCVE.sv'.
SBY 12:13:58 [MCVE] engine_0: aiger suprove
SBY 12:13:58 [MCVE] nomem: starting process "cd MCVE/src; yosys -ql ../model/design_nomem.log ../model/design_nomem.ys"
SBY 12:13:58 [MCVE] nomem: finished (returncode=0)
SBY 12:13:58 [MCVE] aig: starting process "cd MCVE/model; yosys -ql design_aiger.log design_aiger.ys"
SBY 12:13:58 [MCVE] aig: finished (returncode=0)
SBY 12:13:58 [MCVE] engine_0: starting process "cd MCVE; suprove model/design_aiger.aig"
SBY 12:13:58 [MCVE] engine_0: finished (returncode=127)
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/usr/local/bin/sby", line 388, in <module>
    retcode |= run_job(t)
  File "/usr/local/bin/sby", line 346, in run_job
    job.run(setupmode)
  File "/usr/local/bin/../share/yosys/python3/sby_core.py", line 634, in run
    self.taskloop()
  File "/usr/local/bin/../share/yosys/python3/sby_core.py", line 251, in taskloop
    task.poll()
  File "/usr/local/bin/../share/yosys/python3/sby_core.py", line 170, in poll
    self.handle_exit(self.p.returncode)
  File "/usr/local/bin/../share/yosys/python3/sby_core.py", line 108, in handle_exit
    self.exit_callback(retcode)
  File "/usr/local/bin/../share/yosys/python3/sby_engine_aiger.py", line 81, in exit_callback
    assert retcode == 0
AssertionError
```

  File "/usr/local/bin/../share/yosys/python3/sby_core.py", line 634, in run

  File "/usr/local/bin/../share/yosys/python3/sby_core.py", line 251, in taskloop

  File "/usr/local/bin/../share/yosys/python3/sby_core.py", line 170, in poll
